focusedDiff: +    throw "Native-stage consumed-field/packet checker failed with exit code $LASTEXITCODE."

Assert-True ($renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_DOBJ_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_SEGMENT_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_BINDING_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_TEXTURE_EPOCH_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_MATERIAL_EVENT_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_STATE_SPAN_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_DENSE_VERTEX_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('for (i = 0u; i < NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_RUN_COUNT; i++)') -and $renderer.Contains('(u32)run->first_corner + corner_count >') -and $renderer.Contains('NDS_NATIVE_STAGE_CORNER_COUNT')) 'M3 full topology validator no longer covers every generated structure before cache publication.'

+Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains('G2_STATE=%u') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'G2_STATE' -FieldCount 7") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(41, 13, 138, 0, 54, 32)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(44, 13, 164, 0, 69, 34)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(44, 13, 166, 0, 70, 34)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('@(44, 13, 166, 0, 70, 36)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("`$RendererBenchmarkStartEvent -in @('KO','Rebirth')") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$RendererBenchmarkStartFrame -eq 672') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$sampleIndex -ge 4') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("`$RendererBenchmarkStartEvent -eq 'TimeUp'") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$sampleIndex -ge 6') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("`$g2State[1..6] -join ','") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('g2State = @($g2StateSamples)')) 'Realtime verifier does not enforce and export the exact phase-specific G2 write/skip census.'

Assert-True ($rendererVerifier.Contains("-Name 'M3_STAGE' -FieldCount 22") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('gNdsRendererM3TopologyFullValidationCount') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$topologyFaultInjectionExpression = if ($RendererM3Phase0Profile)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains("} else { '0' }") -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3[17] -ge 2') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3[19] -eq 1') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3[20] -eq 1') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3[21] -eq 1') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('$m3[18] -eq ($previousM3[18] + 1)') -and $rendererVerifier.Contains('Production M3 topology cache unexpectedly injected or observed a stamp fault')) 'Realtime M3 verifier does not prove one lab fault revalidation, sustained cache hits, and a fault-free production profile without reading linker-collected lab symbols.'

$m3Phase0MetricSummary = "Renderer M3 Phase 0: samples=$RendererBenchmarkSamples preflight=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 1)) prepareRuns=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 2)) attributeExclusive=$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0AttributeExclusive) nearTransform=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 4)) prepareResidual=$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0PrepareResidual) preflightResidual=$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0PreflightResidual) beginBind=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 5)) raw=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 6)) range=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 7)) noZInclusive=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 8)) noZMatrix=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 9)) noZExclusive=$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0NoZExclusive) accounting=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 10)) commit=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 11)) commitResidual=$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0CommitResidual) timerReads/spans=$($phase0Last[12])/$($phase0Last[13]) calibrationTotal/perRead=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $m3Phase0Samples 14))/$(Get-MedianP95 $phase0CalibrationPerRead) counts=dense$($phase0Last[16])/near$($phase0Last[17])/matrix$($phase0Last[18])"

$g2StateMetricSummary = "Renderer G2 state writes/skips: samples=$RendererBenchmarkSamples texture=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $g2StateSamples 1))/$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $g2StateSamples 2)) matrixMode=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $g2StateSamples 3))/$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $g2StateSamples 4)) polyFmt=$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $g2StateSamples 5))/$(Get-MedianP95 (Get-SampleFieldValues $g2StateSamples 6))"
